allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 26460 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object LocalPort -in 3000,3001,3002 | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 35672 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object LocalPort -in 3000,3001,3002 | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess")
